title: Armory (RPG Series)

body:

## 👑 Epic armor sets, with unique designs and set bonuses.

# 📦 Installation

### Required

- Archers (RPG Series)
- Paladins & Priests (RPG Series)
- Rogues & Warriors (RPG Series)
- Wizard (RPG Series)

# ⭐️ Features

This project adds high tier (end-game) armor sets, specifically designed for combat classes of the RPG Series mods.

## 📦 Obtaining

Obtain Superior Armor Upgrade and Upgrade Crystals from end game loot chests (End City, Ancient City) and boss drops.

Use these to upgrade your RPG Series class armor into epic variants!

![Upgrade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PJvJUdGw/images/5ca973d2ad3736e9ff2b411c980e7cd6a8d92c73.png)

## 👑 Epic armor sets

*   Extra attribute set bonuses
*   Spell modifier set bonuses
*   Unique, high quality models, some with glowing parts
*   Support basic armor trimming (all trims producing the same pattern)
*   Art style follows Minecraft Dungeons aesthetics
*   Inspired by famous classic MMORPG sets :)

![Armor Sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PJvJUdGw/images/9b0a33794bf3bbc06f4c2c88a884f5dd8cd6d97f.png)

![Creative Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PJvJUdGw/images/132c7e6c4275ef588cd5ad8993c5a9e83f81c145.png)
